external_references.description: John Wolfram, Josh Murchie, Matt Lin, Daniel Ainsworth, Robert Wallace, Dimiter Andonov, Dhanesh Kizhakkinan, Jacob Thompson. (2025, January 8). Ivanti Connect Secure VPN Targeted in New Zero-Day Exploitation. Retrieved April 14, 2026.

objects.description: [PHASEJAM](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9014) has used a bash script to modify components on Ivanti Connect Secure appliances and execute files via `/bin/bash`.[1] It has also used the Linux stream editor (`sed`) to execute commands.(Citation: Google UNC5221 Ivanti January 2025)
